concerns.text: Task T018 (Training Loop) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the sole task implementing the core training logic required for US2 and SC-002/SC-004. Without this task, the model cannot be trained, and no downstream tasks (T019, T021, T023) can execute. This leaves the 'Lightweight GNN Training' user story and its success criteria unaddressed.

Task T021 (Inter-family generalization test) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the only task explicitly designed to measure SC-002 (MAPE < 15% on unseen families). The task description includes the necessary logic (runtime check for disjoint families), but the implementation is missing, leaving the primary success criterion for US2 unverified.

Task T013 (Data pipeline orchestration) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the sole task responsible for producing the `data/processed/graphs_v1.parquet` artifact required by SC-001 (>1,000 entries) and Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene checksums). Without this, US1 is not shippable and downstream tasks lack input data.

Task T036 (Inference benchmark) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the only task assigned to verify SC-003 (inference time < 100ms). The task description correctly identifies the output schema requirement, but the missing implementation means the success criterion cannot be validated.

Task T027c (Final report assembly) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the sole task responsible for generating the `data/results/feature_importance_report.md` required by SC-005 (identifying ≥3 descriptors with p < 0.05). The task includes specific logic for failure handling and formatting, but its absence leaves US3 incomplete.

Task T003 (Configure linting/formatting) is marked incomplete [ ]. While seemingly cosmetic, the Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) and the project's reproducibility gates rely on strict code quality standards enforced by ruff/black. The plan explicitly lists this as a prerequisite for the 'Verified Accuracy' gate, making its absence a gap in the foundational setup.

Task T035 (Update README title/description) is marked incomplete [ ]. It is the specific task assigned to address the 'Feynman' review concern and ensure the project title matches the spec ('Structure-Only Surrogate Model'). The missing implementation leaves the project documentation non-compliant with the review resolution requirements.
